# Antek Automation — AI Voice Agent Receptionist
> AI receptionist + AI voice agent for UK businesses. 24/7 call answering, appointment booking, lead qualification and call routing — across therapists, law firms, dentists, accountants, physiotherapists, plumbers and general trades. Network position: national service hub. Vertical spokes link out (electricians, law firms).

## About Antek Automation
- Trading name: Antek Automation (sole trader)
- Founded by: Andy Norman (30+ years in UK field service and managed print)
- Headquarters: Chantry House, 38 Chantry Way, Andover, Hampshire SP10 1LZ
- Phone: 0333 038 9960
- Email: hello@antekautomation.com
- ICO Registration: ZC133436
- DUNS Number: 235593033
- Certified Retell AI Partner, FSB Member
- Brand hub: https://www.antekautomation.com
- This site: https://aivoiceagentreceptionist.co.uk (national receptionist service)
- Sister vertical sites: https://aiforelectricians.co.uk · https://aireceptionistforlawfirms.co.uk

## What This Site Covers
- AI voice receptionist — 24/7 phone-call answering, qualification, booking and routing
- AI chat receptionist — website, Facebook Messenger and WhatsApp enquiry capture
- Reception & workflow automation — follow-ups, confirmations, reminders, review requests
- Service area: United Kingdom
- Common UK verticals: therapists & counselling clinics, law firms & solicitors, plumbers, dentists & dental practices, accountants & bookkeepers, physiotherapists & health clinics, trades & home services

## Key Facts
- 24/7 cover including evenings, weekends, bank holidays and overnight
- Books appointments into Google Calendar, Outlook, Calendly, Cliniko, SimplyBook.me, Dentally, Clio, Xero Practice Manager, LEAP and most UK practice-management or booking systems
- UK GDPR-compliant; caller-data access controls, configurable retention, DPA on request
- Live demo: +44 7782 214455 (real UK business — service-agnostic intake configuration)
- Built on Retell AI by Certified Partner Antek Automation
- No long-term contracts
